topics.title: Artie Lange's Health and Substance Use
topics.summary: The studio addresses Artie Lange's recent absence from the show, his claims of illness, and rumors regarding potential substance use.

topics.title: Artie Lange Drug Use and Radio History
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Artie Lange's potential substance use, his health concerns, and a retrospective look at the history of radio personalities.

topics.title: Weight Loss Competition Strategy
topics.summary: The studio discusses team selections and contestant strategies for an upcoming weight loss competition involving several participants.

topics.title: Weight Loss Competition Weigh-Ins
topics.summary: The studio hosts a weigh-in for participants in a weight loss competition, where team members are weighed and discussed while the host addresses allegations of cheating and provides updates on upcoming segments.

topics.title: American Idol Double Standards and Lottery Luck
topics.summary: The studio explores the differing treatment of contestants on American Idol regarding past photos, followed by a discussion on lottery habits and the ethics of charitable giving.

topics.title: Conspiracy Theories Regarding Princess Diana
topics.summary: The studio hosts a call from Muhammad Al-Fayed, who claims that the death of Princess Diana and Dodi Al-Fayed was a deliberate assassination by the British royal family rather than a car accident.

topics.title: Allegations Regarding the Death of Princess Diana
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who claims to have evidence of a conspiracy involving British intelligence and the royal family regarding the death of Princess Diana.

topics.title: Al Fayed and American Idol Guests
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Mohammed al-Fayed regarding the death of Dodi al-Fayed, followed by a segment with former American Idol contestants Justin Guarini and Kimberly Caldwell.

topics.title: American Idol Experiences and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores the personal lives, career paths, and experiences of former American Idol contestants, including their time on the show, relationships, and financial status.

topics.title: American Idol Alumni Discuss Relationships and Sex
topics.summary: The studio features Justin Guarini and Kimberly Caldwell discussing their personal lives, past experiences on American Idol, and various sexual topics while taking listener calls.

topics.title: Radio Ratings and Celebrity Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding celebrity guests, the impact of Howard Stern’s departure on radio ratings at former stations, and an advertisement for ProFlowers.

topics.title: Radio Ratings and Workplace Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses local radio ratings, the impact of talent departures on station rankings, and internal concerns regarding a colleague's health and professional conduct.

topics.title: Lisa's Claims and Bobby Brown Interview
topics.summary: The show features a segment where Lisa discusses her legal troubles and personal claims before transitioning to a tense interview with Bobby Brown regarding his child support issues and a failed radio deal.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Whitney Houston, Cameron Diaz, and Jerry Springer, while also debating the nuances of public language, drinking habits, and Rudy Giuliani's family relations.

topics.title: Current Events and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the health of Vice President Dick Cheney, reports on drug use involving minors, updates on celebrity film releases, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
